case_title: KLAUDIA KRISTINA CASANOVA VS. GERGELY JARMY et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-22-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES CONTINUED FROM JUN-22-2011 TO AUG-17-2011, 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206 PER ORAL REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY, GERGELY JARMY. DEFENDANT WILL BE OUT OF THE COUNTRY. (206)

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON AUG-17-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES CONTINUED FROM AUG-17-2011 TO AUG-24-2011, 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206 AT THE REQUEST OF THE APPLICANT/DEFENDANT GERGELY JARMY. DEFENDANT WILL BE IN BOSTON. (206)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GERGELY JARMY'S NOTICE OF MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE. AT THE HEARING, PLAINTIFF ACKNOWLEDGES SERVICE OF THE MOTION, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS VACATED AND MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SERVES DEFENDANT WITH COMPLAINT, IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT HAS 30 DAYS TO RESPOND. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-24-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT GERGELY JARMY'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-05-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON AUG-26-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-05-2011 - CASE DISMISSED BY ORDER OF THE COURT. NO APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. GERGELY JARMY APPEARED AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. THE MATTER WAS CALLED FOR THE THIRD TIME AT 9:55AM, AND THEREBY NO APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF, THE COURT DISMIISED THE CASE. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
